title: senecio ettoreus
intro: Senecio ettoreus, a plant species belonging to the daisy family, is also known as Ettore's ragwort or Ettore's groundsel. It is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio ettoreus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a valuable herbal remedy in folk medicine. In herbal preparations, Senecio ettoreus is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
